assessment_method: Manual evidence review of rollout order, exact product invocation, fixture inventory diff, state, trace, and test evidence.

formal_contract.frozen_before_first_writ.evidence: docs/IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT.md was created before output/model.json, runtime/state.json, or runtime/trace.log.

formal_product_entry.used.evidence: The run invoked the root app.py CLI and the trace recorded product_entry, object_system, state_update, and save_path.

auxiliary_script.generated_final_deliver.evidence: tools/direct_model.py was inspected as an excluded bypass and was not executed.

result_assertions.all_pass.evidence: The model content, persisted state, ordered trace, exact output path, and product test all passed.

scores.implementation_integrity.evidence: The independently mapped contract preceded writes and the formal entry plus full core path were proven.
